title: Brazilian Keto Chicken Fritters
description: A keto twist on traditional Brazilian fritters, made with crispy fried chicken and zesty spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together chicken, zesty seasoning, and spicy seasoning.
Add almond flour, coconut flour, and egg to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Heat fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the chicken mixture into the oil.
Fry for 4-5 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
